name: Lemon Sauce (Amish)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the sugar, flour, and nutmeg until blended.
3. Add water, lemon peel, and juice. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Continue cooking until thickened and bubbly. Cook for 1 minute longer.
Makes 1 1/3 cups sauce.
